race.comment: CINCHICATED (9) started at $6.0 but was beaten out of sight at her only run to date over this trip at Doomben in January. Won a Sunshine Coast trial on 26 May. Clearly has more to offer so she deserves another chance. JETHRO (3) last appeared when a tiring fifth on debut over 1000m at Eagle Farm in November. Has switched stables and trialled okay at this track recently so a better run looks on the cards. MISS SO AND SO (10) returns from a three-month spell. Ran a decent race at her only appearance last prep, beaten under two lengths over this trip at Mackay. Has a tricky gate to deal with but otherwise makes plenty of appeal. PETER PROFIT (5) debuts. Unbeaten in three trials dating back to January. Very short in early markets so that trial form is expected to transfer to race form. Another first starter in NOJUNKMAIL (4) placed in a recent trial and is worth keeping tabs on.
